description: Italian criminal organization active from 1987 to 1994, primarily in Emilia-Romagna and Marche. Composed largely of police officers with right-wing extremist ties, the gang committed 102 heists, resulting in 24 deaths and 102 injuries. Founded by the Savi brothers, it was known for using a white Fiat Uno. The gang was dismantled in 1994 after police investigations.
